title: GSM Scanner
profTagline: Sweep the GSM band around you with your HackRF
installDesc: Add to your home screen for full-screen scanning.
installIosHint: Tap Share, then Add to Home Screen.
installGenericHint: Open the browser menu and choose Install.
connectBody: Plug the HackRF into this phone with a USB-C OTG cable, then grant access. It reads the cellular band's public broadcast energy on-device — no Cell-IDs, no subscriber data, nothing recorded.
noUsb: This browser has no WebUSB. Open in Chrome on Android or desktop.
